name: Classic Solid
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='100%' height='4' preserveAspectRatio='none'><rect width='100%' height='4' fill='#333'/></svg>

name: Thin Elegant
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='100%' height='2' preserveAspectRatio='none'><rect width='100%' height='1' y='0.5' fill='#555'/></svg>

name: Double Line
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='100%' height='8' preserveAspectRatio='none'><rect width='100%' height='2' y='0' fill='#333'/><rect width='100%' height='2' y='6' fill='#333'/></svg>

name: Triple Line
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='100%' height='10' preserveAspectRatio='none'><rect width='100%' height='2' y='0' fill='#333'/><rect width='100%' height='2' y='4' fill='#999'/><rect width='100%' height='2' y='8' fill='#333'/></svg>

name: Dashed
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='100%' height='4' preserveAspectRatio='none'><line x1='0' y1='2' x2='100%' y2='2' stroke='#444' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='10,6'/></svg>

name: Dotted
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='100%' height='6' preserveAspectRatio='none'><line x1='0' y1='3' x2='100%' y2='3' stroke='#444' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='3,5' stroke-linecap='round'/></svg>

name: Wave
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='200' height='10' preserveAspectRatio='xMidYMid repeat'><path d='M0 5 Q12.5 0 25 5 Q37.5 10 50 5 Q62.5 0 75 5 Q87.5 10 100 5 Q112.5 0 125 5 Q137.5 10 150 5 Q162.5 0 175 5 Q187.5 10 200 5' stroke='#555' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/></svg>

name: Zigzag
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='120' height='8' preserveAspectRatio='xMidYMid repeat'><polyline points='0,7 15,1 30,7 45,1 60,7 75,1 90,7 105,1 120,7' stroke='#444' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/></svg>

name: Gradient Blue
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='100%' height='4' preserveAspectRatio='none'><defs><linearGradient id='gb' x1='0' x2='1' y1='0' y2='0'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#1976d2'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#90caf9'/></linearGradient></defs><rect width='100%' height='4' fill='url(#gb)'/></svg>

name: Gradient Sunset
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='100%' height='4' preserveAspectRatio='none'><defs><linearGradient id='gs' x1='0' x2='1' y1='0' y2='0'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#ff6f00'/><stop offset='50%' stop-color='#e91e63'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#7b1fa2'/></linearGradient></defs><rect width='100%' height='4' fill='url(#gs)'/></svg>

name: Gradient Forest
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='100%' height='4' preserveAspectRatio='none'><defs><linearGradient id='gf' x1='0' x2='1' y1='0' y2='0'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#1b5e20'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#a5d6a7'/></linearGradient></defs><rect width='100%' height='4' fill='url(#gf)'/></svg>

name: Ornate Center
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='600' height='16' preserveAspectRatio='xMidYMid meet'><line x1='0' y1='8' x2='240' y2='8' stroke='#555' stroke-width='1.5'/><polygon points='290,8 275,3 260,8 275,13' fill='#555'/><circle cx='290' cy='8' r='4' fill='#555'/><polygon points='310,8 325,3 340,8 325,13' fill='#555'/><line x1='360' y1='8' x2='600' y2='8' stroke='#555' stroke-width='1.5'/></svg>

name: Diamond Chain
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='80' height='12' preserveAspectRatio='xMidYMid repeat'><line x1='0' y1='6' x2='25' y2='6' stroke='#555' stroke-width='1.5'/><polygon points='40,2 46,6 40,10 34,6' fill='none' stroke='#555' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='55' y1='6' x2='80' y2='6' stroke='#555' stroke-width='1.5'/></svg>

name: Brush Stroke
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='100%' height='10' preserveAspectRatio='none'><path d='M0 6 C50 2, 150 8, 250 5 S400 3, 500 6 S650 8, 800 5' stroke='#333' stroke-width='3' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round' opacity='0.8'/></svg>

name: Shadow Thick
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='100%' height='8' preserveAspectRatio='none'><rect width='100%' height='4' y='0' fill='#222'/><rect width='100%' height='2' y='5' fill='#bbb' opacity='0.5'/></svg>

name: Stars
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='120' height='12' preserveAspectRatio='xMidYMid repeat'><line x1='0' y1='6' x2='42' y2='6' stroke='#888' stroke-width='1'/><text x='60' y='9' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#555'>★</text><line x1='78' y1='6' x2='120' y2='6' stroke='#888' stroke-width='1'/></svg>

name: Leaf Vine
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='160' height='14' preserveAspectRatio='xMidYMid repeat'><line x1='0' y1='7' x2='160' y2='7' stroke='#4caf50' stroke-width='1.5'/><ellipse cx='20' cy='5' rx='6' ry='3' fill='#66bb6a' transform='rotate(-30,20,5)'/><ellipse cx='55' cy='9' rx='6' ry='3' fill='#388e3c' transform='rotate(30,55,9)'/><ellipse cx='90' cy='5' rx='6' ry='3' fill='#66bb6a' transform='rotate(-30,90,5)'/><ellipse cx='125' cy='9' rx='6' ry='3' fill='#388e3c' transform='rotate(30,125,9)'/></svg>

name: Morse
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='120' height='6' preserveAspectRatio='xMidYMid repeat'><rect x='0' y='2' width='16' height='2' fill='#444'/><rect x='20' y='2' width='6' height='2' fill='#444'/><rect x='30' y='2' width='16' height='2' fill='#444'/><rect x='50' y='2' width='6' height='2' fill='#444'/><rect x='60' y='2' width='6' height='2' fill='#444'/><rect x='70' y='2' width='16' height='2' fill='#444'/><rect x='90' y='2' width='6' height='2' fill='#444'/><rect x='100' y='2' width='16' height='2' fill='#444'/></svg>

name: Rainbow
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='100%' height='6' preserveAspectRatio='none'><defs><linearGradient id='rbow' x1='0' x2='1' y1='0' y2='0'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#f44336'/><stop offset='17%' stop-color='#ff9800'/><stop offset='33%' stop-color='#ffeb3b'/><stop offset='50%' stop-color='#4caf50'/><stop offset='67%' stop-color='#2196f3'/><stop offset='83%' stop-color='#3f51b5'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#9c27b0'/></linearGradient></defs><rect width='100%' height='6' fill='url(#rbow)'/></svg>

name: Circuit
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='200' height='10' preserveAspectRatio='xMidYMid repeat'><line x1='0' y1='5' x2='30' y2='5' stroke='#1976d2' stroke-width='1.5'/><rect x='30' y='2' width='12' height='6' fill='none' stroke='#1976d2' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='42' y1='5' x2='80' y2='5' stroke='#1976d2' stroke-width='1.5'/><circle cx='80' cy='5' r='3' fill='#1976d2'/><line x1='83' y1='5' x2='120' y2='5' stroke='#1976d2' stroke-width='1.5'/><rect x='120' y='2' width='12' height='6' fill='none' stroke='#1976d2' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='132' y1='5' x2='170' y2='5' stroke='#1976d2' stroke-width='1.5'/><circle cx='170' cy='5' r='3' fill='#1976d2'/><line x1='173' y1='5' x2='200' y2='5' stroke='#1976d2' stroke-width='1.5'/></svg>
